overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic corporate district in Night City. The character moves from a sunlit plaza with palm trees past the Kiroshi building, through a neon-lit covered tunnel, and emerges into another open urban area. The video showcases high-quality game engine graphics with dramatic lighting transitions between natural and artificial environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate plaza with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: silver sports car drives past in the foreground
yellow taxi cab passes by on the right side of the street
approaching the entrance to the covered tunnel under the Kiroshi building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the Kiroshi building entrance, passing by security personnel

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the multi-lane road
security guards standing near a parked black van

large glowing pink and cyan circular Kiroshi corporate logo
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
tall vertical screen displaying animated advertisements
futuristic illuminated pole with cyan glowing panels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit corporate plaza dominated by the Kiroshi building's massive facade and glowing circular neon sign. Palm trees line the walkways as the character walks forward along the concrete sidewalk. A yellow taxi passes on the right while security personnel stand near a parked van on the left. The camera approaches the dark tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban roadway with cyan neon lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dark artificial cyan neon
path curves gently to the right within the tunnel structure
vintage green coupe drives past on the right side of the tunnel roadway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered tunnel passage, following the curved sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray sweater and plaid pants walking ahead on the sidewalk
classic green car driving through the tunnel roadway

entered.detail: dark geometric metal ceiling with industrial paneling
long continuous strips of cyan light running along the ceiling
dark metallic walls with horizontal ridges and red indicator lights
yellow double lines and white textured crosswalk patterns on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered tunnel beneath the Kiroshi building, where bright sunlight gives way to artificial cyan neon lighting. The enclosed space features geometric metal ceilings and dark wall panels. Several vehicles including a vintage green car drive past on the right while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The path curves gently as the character proceeds through the consistently lit underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air pedestrian corridor between modern corporate buildings

events.description: exiting the covered tunnel into bright outdoor urban plaza
abrupt transition from artificial cyan lighting to warm natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing walk through the sunlit plaza area, passing pedestrians and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in hooded jacket standing near the street lamp

entered.detail: elevated walkway connecting the two sides of the corporate buildings
tall contemporary structure with reflective glass facade
parked red convertible sports car on the street side
dark metal roll-down shutters on the ground floor shops

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the tunnel into a bright sunlit corridor between modern corporate buildings. A pedestrian overpass spans the street ahead, and palm trees are visible in the distance. The lighting shifts back to warm natural sunlight, illuminating the concrete walkways and glass facades. A red sports car is parked along the right side as the character continues walking through the open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright corporate plaza through a neon-lit underpass and back into a sunlit urban corridor. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath the massive facade and glowing circular sign of the Kiroshi building, passing palm trees and a yellow taxi as the camera approaches a dark tunnel entrance. As the character enters the covered passage, the natural light gives way to artificial cyan neon lighting reflecting off geometric metal ceilings and dark wall panels while vehicles and pedestrians flow through the enclosed space. The scene then opens as the character emerges from the tunnel, where the lighting shifts back to warm natural sunlight illuminating glass facades and a pedestrian overpass. The movement finally settles into a bright open plaza featuring a parked red sports car and distant palm trees.
